main.c(3) Library Functions Manual main.c(3)

NAME

main.c - TODO: Add Doxygen documentation for session string generation utility.

SYNOPSIS

Macros


#define SESSION_STRING_BUFFER_SIZE 40
#define ACDS_MAX_UNIQUE_SESSIONS (2500LL * 5000LL * 5000LL)

Functions


int main (int argc, char *argv[])

Detailed Description

TODO: Add Doxygen documentation for session string generation utility.

Command-line tool for generating memorable session identifiers (adjective-noun-noun). Also exports wordlists as JavaScript for web client compatibility.

Needs documentation for:

  • CLI interface and options
  • Session string format and constraints
  • Wordlist export functionality
  • Integration with ACDS

Definition in file strings/main.c.

Macro Definition Documentation

#define ACDS_MAX_UNIQUE_SESSIONS (2500LL * 5000LL * 5000LL)

Definition at line 26 of file strings/main.c.

Referenced by main().

#define SESSION_STRING_BUFFER_SIZE 40

Definition at line 25 of file strings/main.c.

Referenced by acds_string_generate(), database_session_leave(), options_init(), options_preset_unified(), and parse_client_address().

Function Documentation

int main (int argc, char * argv[])

Definition at line 29 of file strings/main.c.

29                                  {
30   long long count = 1;
31   int dump_adjectives = 0;
32   int dump_nouns = 0;
33 
34   static struct option long_options[] = {
35     {"count", required_argument, 0, 'n'},
36     {"dump-adjectives", no_argument, 0, 'a'},
37     {"dump-nouns", no_argument, 0, 'o'},
38     {"help", no_argument, 0, 'h'},
39     {0, 0, 0, 0}
40   };
41 
42   int opt;
43   while ((opt = getopt_long(argc, argv, "n:aoh", long_options, NULL)) != -1) {
44     switch (opt) {
45       case 'n':
46         count = strtoll(optarg, NULL, 10);
47         break;
48       case 'a':
49         dump_adjectives = 1;
50         break;
51       case 'o':
52         dump_nouns = 1;
53         break;
54       case 'h':
55         printf("Usage: ascii-chat-strings [OPTIONS]\n");
56         printf("Generate memorable session strings (adjective-noun-noun format)\n");
57         printf("\nOptions:\n");
58         printf("  -n, --count COUNT        Generate COUNT session strings (default: 1)\n");
59         printf("  -a, --dump-adjectives    Dump adjectives list as JavaScript\n");
60         printf("  -o, --dump-nouns         Dump nouns list as JavaScript\n");
61         printf("  -h, --help               Show this help message\n");
62         return 0;
63       default:
64         return ERROR_USAGE;
65     }
66   }
67 
68   // Handle dump modes
69   if (dump_adjectives) {
70     printf("export const adjectives = [\n");
71     for (size_t i = 0; i < adjectives_count; i++) {
72       printf("  \"%s\"%s\n", adjectives[i], (i < adjectives_count - 1) ? "," : "");
73     }
74     printf("];\n");
75     printf("export const adjectives_count = %zu;\n", adjectives_count);
76     return 0;
77   }
78 
79   if (dump_nouns) {
80     printf("export const nouns = [\n");
81     for (size_t i = 0; i < nouns_count; i++) {
82       printf("  \"%s\"%s\n", nouns[i], (i < nouns_count - 1) ? "," : "");
83     }
84     printf("];\n");
85     printf("export const nouns_count = %zu;\n", nouns_count);
86     return 0;
87   }
88 
89   // Normal session string generation
90   if (count <= 0 || (long long)count > ACDS_MAX_UNIQUE_SESSIONS) {
91     return ERROR_USAGE;
92   }
93 
94   // Generate session strings
95   for (long long i = 0; i < count; i++) {
96     uint32_t adj_idx = randombytes_uniform((uint32_t)adjectives_count);
97     uint32_t noun1_idx = randombytes_uniform((uint32_t)nouns_count);
98     uint32_t noun2_idx = randombytes_uniform((uint32_t)nouns_count);
99 
100     printf("%s-%s-%s\n",
101            adjectives[adj_idx],
102            nouns[noun1_idx],
103            nouns[noun2_idx]);
104   }
105 
106   return 0;
107 }




References ACDS_MAX_UNIQUE_SESSIONS, adjectives,
    adjectives_count, ERROR_USAGE, nouns, and
    nouns_count.
